verifier_values.criteria: Produces a bar chart in excel file.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt specifically requests to produce a bar chart showing the Average Total Revenue for each sector.

verifier_values.criteria: Produces exactly 5 bars in the bar chart.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt explicity requires the model to create a bar chart with 5 sectors.

verifier_values.criteria: Places Sector on the x-axis of the chart.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt explicity requires the model to use Sector in the x-axis.

verifier_values.criteria: Places Average Total Revenue on the y-axis of the chart.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt explicity requires the model to use Average Total Revenue in the y-axis.

verifier_values.criteria: Labels the Average Total Revenue of Construction as 299,245,291 +/- 100.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt specifically requests to create a bar chart that shows Average Total Revenue for five sectors, Construction, Healthcare, Hospitality, Logistics and Manufacturing. 299,245,291 is the correct Average Total Revenue for Construction.
